activeVisitChanged: The patient's active visit changed. Close this form and restart check-in.
activeVisitLocationMismatch: The active visit belongs to another location or service. End or correct it before checking in this appointment.
activeVisitTypeMismatch: The active visit type does not match the appointment service. Correct the visit before continuing.
appointmentCancellationFailed: The appointment could not be cancelled. Review its status and try again.
appointmentCancellationStatusChanged: The appointment status changed and no longer permits cancellation. Refresh the list.
appointmentBatchStatusChanged: The appointment status changed. Refresh the list before trying again.
appointmentCheckedInAfterVisitStarted: The visit was started, the patient was added to the queue, and the appointment was checked in.
appointmentCheckedInWithExistingVisit: The appointment was checked in using the active visit and the patient was added to the queue.
appointmentCheckInFailed: The appointment could not be checked in. Try again.
appointmentCheckoutFailedSafely: The care episode could not be completed. The appointment was not completed. Review its status and try again.
appointmentCheckoutStatusChanged: The appointment status changed and no longer permits checkout. Refresh the list.
appointmentCompletionPendingAfterVisitCl: The visit is already closed, but the appointment could not be completed. Retry; the visit will not be closed again.
appointmentVisitClosurePendingAfterCompl: The appointment is completed, but its visit or queue could not be closed. Retry to reconcile the closure.
appointmentEditStatusChanged: The appointment status changed and no longer permits editing. Refresh the list.
appointmentEditStatusCheckFailed: The current appointment status could not be verified. Try again.
appointmentEndedAndVisitClosedSuccessful: The queue entry and visit were closed, and the appointment was marked as completed.
appointmentEndedSharedVisitKeptOpen: The appointment was completed. The visit and queue remain active because another linked appointment is still in progress.
appointmentEndedButVisitNotClosedError: Appointment ended, but error closing visit
appointmentLocationMissing: The appointment has no valid location. Correct the appointment before starting care.
appointmentNowVisible: It is now visible on the Appointments page
appointmentSaveFailed: The appointment could not be saved. Review the data and try again.
appointmentStatusChanged: The appointment status changed. Refresh the list before continuing.
appointmentsUpdatedMessage: Appointments for selected patients have been successfully updated
appointmentsUpdateFailedSafeMessage: The appointment for {{patient}} could not be updated. Review its status and try again.
appointmentVisitLinkNotConfigured: The appointment-to-visit link is not configured. Contact an administrator before continuing.
appointmentVisitLinkMismatch: The active visit is not linked to this appointment. Correct the link before completing care.
appointmentVisitTypeMappingMissing: This service has no approved rule for reusing an active visit. Start new care only after the existing visit has ended.
cancelAppointmentModalConfirmationText: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
changeStatusForSelectedAppointments: Change the status for the following appointments.
dateAppointmentIssuedCannotBeAfterAppoin: Date appointment issued cannot be after the appointment date
durationErrorMessage: Duration should be greater than zero
endAppointmentAndVisitConfirmationMessag: Checking the patient out will mark the appointment as complete, and close out the active visit for this patient.
endAppointmentConfirmation: Are you sure you want to check the patient out for this appointment?
endAppointmentConfirmationMessage: Checking the patient out will mark the appointment as complete.
failedToEndActiveVisit: Failed to end active visit for {{patient}}
invalidAppointmentStatusChange: Cannot transition appointment with status {{currentStatus}} to status {{newStatus}}
markAppointmentAsCompletedMessage: Marking appointment as completed will end the active visit of the patient
multipleActiveVisits: The patient has more than one active visit. Resolve the visits before continuing.
multipleActiveVisitsPreventCheckout: The patient has more than one active visit. Resolve the visits before completing the appointment.
multipleLinkedVisitsPreventCheckout: The appointment is linked to more than one active visit. Resolve the visits before completing care.
noCurrentAppointments: There are no appointments scheduled for today to display for this patient
noPastAppointments: There are no past appointments to display for this patient
noUpcomingAppointmentsForPatient: There are no upcoming appointments to display for this patient
patientDoubleBooking: Patient already booked for an appointment at this time
recurringAppointmentShouldHaveEndDate: A recurring appointment should have an end date
serviceUnavailable: Appointment time is outside of service hours
